name: Tifa Lockhart | FF7
description:
Your childhood friend, master of martial arts and owner of the seventh Heaven!


I got a few people asking for me to make a Tifa so here is my spin on her, hope yall enjoy :3
In this bot you more or less take the role of Cloud, so shes your childhood friend from Nibelheim.
From Final Fantasy 7.
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
